description: §38.13.5 — a `watches=orders` feed sources its table shape from a §52 `authority="server" table="orders"` collection (canonical ${...} placement, §52.3.5) with NO `<schema>` block. The §52 authority decl's declared fields ARE the columns, so E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-UNKNOWN-TABLE does NOT fire and the id-PK is derivable (no W-CHANNEL-WATCHES-NO-PK). The `<onchange>` arms patch the §52 @orders collection by primary key.
rationale: §38.13.5: `watches=` carries deltas; a §52 `authority="server" table=<T>` cell owns the collection. They compose — the watched table's row shape resolves from the §52 authority type-decl's declared fields, so the table is 'declared' for the §38.13.1 gate and UNKNOWN-TABLE stays silent.
